name: NewSecGap Phase 56 — NS 14 CSVs URL Backfill + June 2026 Re-search + Exhaustive New-Row Audit
description: Bring data/outputs/ns/*.final.csv (14 files) from ~78% to 95%+ evidence confidence. Three workstreams: (Q1-A) URL backfill for 103 implemented/conditional rows lacking source URLs; (Q1-B) June 2026 re-search for azuredns+frontdoor stale Phase 48 cache entries; (Q2) exhaustive new-row audit for NS sub-controls GA'd in 2025-2026. No CSV recreation — enrich in-place only.
confidenceGap: 103 uncovered rows (mostly implemented without MCSB baseline URL) + azuredns/frontdoor stale 2025 cache + Q2 new-row audit pending

readFirst.why: Full phase log Phases 1-55, scope gates, workflow protocol
Tail for Phase 55 entry — latest completed. Phase 55 = NS 14 CSVs enriched, quality gate PASS
Section 5 added Phase 55 — ns/ folder inventory, coverage table, key corrections
The 14 .final.csv files to enrich. Read each header + first 5 rows to confirm schema before writing
Prior enrichment script pattern to mirror for phase56_url_backfill.py

csvSchema.notePattern: Append 'Source: {url}' to existing notes — do NOT replace existing content

verdictTaxonomy.changeRule: Do NOT change verdict without MCSB baseline evidence. URL backfill = notes only.

workstreams.name: URL Backfill — implemented rows without source
workstreams.approach: One Exa search per service slug fetches MCSB baseline page. Apply baseline URL to ALL uncovered implemented rows for that service in one pass.

individualRows.action: verify DDoS plan has no data plane — confirm + note

workstreams.name: June 2026 Re-search — stale azuredns + frontdoor cache
workstreams.rationale: azuredns and frontdoor evidence from Phase 48 cache (2025 dates). Re-search June 2026 to confirm or update now_applicable_native / still_not_applicable rows.

services.exaQuery: Azure DNS MCSB security baseline 2025 2026 Defender for DNS LT-1 resource logs Policy
Azure Front Door MCSB security baseline 2025 2026 WAF IP filtering Private Link KV certs

workstreams.name: Exhaustive New-Row Audit — NS sub-controls 2025-2026
workstreams.approach: 6 Exa queries scanning NS sub-controls NS-1 through NS-8 for features GA'd in 2025-2026 not yet in CSVs. If new feature found: add SUPPLEMENT row with same 14-col schema.

supplementRowFormat.blast_radius: Wide if conditional or no azure_api_property

exaQueries.query: Azure network security NS-3 service-to-service firewall rules new feature GA 2025 2026
Azure TLS 1.3 enforcement NS-4 Application Gateway WAF Azure Bastion VPN Gateway 2025 2026 GA
Azure DDoS Protection NS-5 Standard Network tier update new feature 2025 2026
Azure IDPS intrusion detection NS-6 new services beyond Azure Firewall Premium 2025 2026
Azure disable public network access NS-7 new services Private Endpoint 2025 2026
Azure Private DNS NS-8 WAF Application Gateway Bastion VPN Gateway integration 2025 2026

scriptsToWrite.purpose: Apply MCSB baseline URL to all uncovered implemented/conditional rows
scriptsToWrite.pattern: Mirror scripts/phase55_exa_enrich.py — PATCHES list with append=True, notes='Source: {url}'
scriptsToWrite.inputData: Exa findings dict built after running workstream Q1-A searches

scriptsToWrite.purpose: Add Q2 new SUPPLEMENT rows if Exa finds 2025-2026 new NS features
scriptsToWrite.condition: Only write this script if Q2 audit finds at least one new feature

executionSteps.action: Exa batch: fetch 14 MCSB baseline pages (parallel, one per service slug)
Exa: re-search azuredns (4 queries) + frontdoor (8 queries) June 2026
Exa batch: run 6 NS sub-control sweep queries
Write scripts/phase56_url_backfill.py with all baseline URL findings
Run python3 scripts/phase56_url_backfill.py — apply to all 14 CSVs
Individual rows: verify and patch appgateway PV-3/PV-5/IM-3, servicebus PV-3/PV-5, ddosprotection DP-3, vpngateway IM-7/PA-7, azuredns PA-7, frontdoor PA-7
Write scripts/phase56_supplement_rows.py if new features found; run it
Run quality gate — all 14 must PASS (uncovered < 5, zero bad verdicts, zero now_app without URL)
git add -f data/outputs/ns/ scripts/phase56_*.py && git commit
STOP — do not start Phase 57 or IM domain work

qualityGate.command:
python3 -c "
import csv, pathlib
ALLOWED = {'implemented','now_applicable_native','upgraded_implemented','still_not_applicable','conditional','not_applicable_paas','not_applicable_arm'}
slugs = ['appgateway','azuredns','azurefirewall','bastion','ddosprotection','firewallmanager','frontdoor','networkwatcher','privatelink','publicip','redis','servicebus','vpngateway','waf']
all_ok = True
for s in slugs:
    rows = list(csv.DictReader(open(f'data/outputs/ns/{s}.final.csv')))
    bad = {r['verdict_2025'] for r in rows} - ALLOWED
    no_url = [r for r in rows if r['verdict_2025']=='now_applicable_native' and 'http' not in r.get('notes','')]
    uncovered = [r for r in rows if 'http' not in r.get('notes','') and 'Source' not in r.get('notes','') and not any(x in r.get('notes','').lower() for x in ['infrastructure','azure platform','no customer','not applicable','monitoring service'])]
    ok = not bad and not no_url and len(uncovered) < 5
    if not ok: all_ok = False
    print(f'[{\"OK\" if ok else \"FAIL\"}] {s:<22} rows={len(rows):>3} uncovered={len(uncovered):>3}')
print()
print('QUALITY GATE:', 'PASS' if all_ok else 'FAIL')
"
mustPass: All 14 CSVs: zero now_applicable_native without URL
Q2 finding documented (new rows added OR explicit no-new-features note in activity.log)

constraints: NO verdict changes without MCSB baseline evidence — URL backfill = notes append only
NO CSV recreation — enrich in-place only
NO Phase 52 NS CSVs in scope (those are Phase 57)
git add with -f flag required for data/outputs/ns/ (gitignored path, but files are tracked)
ADO_PAT: not needed in Phase 56 (no ADO ops)
Process Q1-A first (highest coverage gain per Exa call), then Q1-B, then Q2
successCriteria: Uncovered rows per CSV: < 5 (down from 4-13 current)
azuredns + frontdoor: June 2026 evidence confirmed or updated
Commits pushed: CSVs + scripts + activity.log + CLAUDE.md
